settings.heading: Silver Star Sauna Model – Handcrafted Luxury Saunas
settings.description: Spacious, timeless, and built to gather. The Silver Star is our flagship sauna — designed for those who want the full sauna experience without compromise.

settings.heading: The Silver Star Sauna, Rooted in Northwest Tradition
settings.description: Built for space, warmth, and gathering — the Silver Star delivers the full sauna experience.

settings.title: Generous Interior Dimensions
settings.description: 8'×6' footprint with a 7' ceiling provides comfortable standing room and ample seating for 4–6 people.

settings.title: Dual-Tier Cedar Benches
settings.description: Full-length upper and lower benches built with clear western red cedar, offering flexibility for lounging or sitting upright.

settings.title: Harvia Electric Heater System
settings.description: Equipped with a Harvia electric heater sized for optimal heat distribution across the Silver Star's generous interior.

settings.title: Integrated Accessories
settings.description: Standard kit includes cedar bucket, ladle, thermometer/hygrometer combo, and premium sauna stones.

settings.heading: Silver Star Exterior: Enduring Presence, Effortless Style
settings.description: The Silver Star makes a statement in any backyard. Clean lines, rich cedar grain, and considered proportions that age beautifully in the Pacific Northwest climate.

settings.title: Weather-Sealed Construction
settings.description: Tongue-and-groove cedar panels with a galvanized steel roof and sealed foundation create a structure built to withstand rain, snow, and UV exposure year-round.

settings.title: Signature Design Elements
settings.description: A tinted tempered glass window, custom NW Immersion door handle, and hand-finished roof cap create a look that's distinctly Northwest.

settings.heading: Sauna Accessories and Bespoke Upgrades
settings.description: Every Silver Star comes standard with our curated accessories kit. For those who want more, bespoke upgrades let you tailor the sauna experience to your exact vision.

settings.text: Premium cedar bucket and ladle set

settings.heading: Your Journey Into Heat and Stillness
settings.description: From your first inquiry through delivery day, we guide you through a seamless, transparent process.

settings.title: Initial Consultation
settings.description: Tell us about your space, preferences, and vision. We'll help you choose the right model and options.

settings.title: Custom Quote
settings.description: Receive a detailed, no-pressure quote based on your specific selections and site requirements.

settings.title: Handcrafted Build
settings.description: Your sauna is built to order in our Vancouver WA workshop using time-tested joinery techniques.

settings.title: Delivery & Install
settings.description: We deliver and install your sauna, ensuring it's perfectly leveled and ready for your first session.

settings.title: Enjoy & Unwind
settings.description: Step in, pour water on the stones, and discover why heat, steam, and cedar change everything.

settings.heading: Visit Our Vancouver WA Warehouse
settings.description: See the craftsmanship in person. Walk through finished saunas, talk to the builders, and feel the cedar.

settings.heading: Stories from the Steam
settings.description: Hear from Silver Star owners who made the commitment to real heat, real wood, and real craft.

settings.quote: The Silver Star exceeded every expectation. The craftsmanship is extraordinary — every joint, every cedar plank is perfect. Our family uses it almost every evening now.
settings.author: Mike & Sarah T.

settings.quote: We visited the workshop before ordering and knew immediately. The attention to detail is something you can't fake. Best purchase we've made for our home.
settings.author: David R.

settings.quote: From consultation to delivery, NW Immersion made the entire process effortless. The sauna is a work of art. We couldn't be happier.
settings.author: Jennifer & Tom L.

settings.heading: Get a Quote for Your Silver Star Sauna
settings.description: Every sauna is built to order. Tell us about your space, and we'll provide a detailed, no-pressure quote tailored to your Silver Star.

settings.question: What are the dimensions of the Silver Star?
settings.answer: The Silver Star measures 8' × 6' with a 7' ceiling, comfortably seating 4–6 people across dual-tier benches.

settings.question: What type of wood is used?
settings.answer: We use clear western red cedar sourced from Pacific Northwest mills. It's naturally resistant to moisture, decay, and insects — ideal for sauna conditions.

settings.question: How long does the build process take?
settings.answer: Our standard build time is approximately 10 weeks from the date your order is confirmed. Custom options or seasonal demand may adjust the timeline.

settings.question: What heater comes with the Silver Star?
settings.answer: The Silver Star includes a Harvia electric heater sized for optimal heat distribution across the full 8'×6' interior.

settings.question: Do you offer delivery and installation?
settings.answer: Yes. We deliver throughout the Pacific Northwest and offer full installation. We'll place and level your sauna so it's ready to use on delivery day.

settings.question: Can I customize the Silver Star?
settings.answer: Absolutely. Bespoke options include LED lighting, Bluetooth speakers, custom window configurations, and finish choices.

settings.question: What is the warranty?
settings.answer: Every Silver Star comes with a comprehensive warranty covering structural integrity, materials, and craftsmanship.

settings.question: What electrical requirements are needed?
settings.answer: The Silver Star requires a dedicated 240V circuit. We provide detailed electrical specifications after your order is placed.

settings.question: Can I visit the workshop before ordering?
settings.answer: Yes! We welcome visitors to our Vancouver WA workshop. Schedule a visit to see saunas being built and speak with our craftsmen.

settings.question: How do I get a quote?
settings.answer: Contact us via phone at (360) 907-8928, email info@nwimmersion.com, or use our online quote request form. We respond within 24 hours.
